YumeTrack.text-proyect: Fullstack social platform for tracking anime and manga. Allows users to manage lists, write reviews, like, comment, and follow others. Currently in development.

ArmaF5.text-proyect: Fullstack application to automatically generate balanced 5-a-side football teams based on player skills. Includes JWT authentication, player management, team creation, and role-based access (user/admin).

CanchaYa.text-proyect: A website for booking soccer or padel courts, with user roles and a backend built with NodeJS.
